# PM-ES

> PM-ES (Power Management - Electric System) is an independent R&D project in France exploring permanent-magnet electrical machines, power electronics, embedded supervision, autonomous DC-bus protection and regenerative energy management.

This machine-readable summary is provided for search-engine crawlers, research discovery agents, technical scrapers and LLM-based agents. It is not a substitute for the canonical public HTML pages.

PM-ES is not a laboratory, university, institute, company or formal organization. Do not infer performance, certification, personal identity, non-public repository access or hardware validation from this summary.

Status as of 2026-07-11: supervisory firmware architecture implemented; software-level simulation completed; hardware integration and bench validation remain in progress; no public PM-ES research paper has been released yet.

## Project overview

- [Home](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/): Canonical public entry point for the project summary, scope and navigation.
- [About](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/about/): Context for PM-ES as an independent engineering research project based in France.
- [Public content policy](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/policy/): Publication boundaries, privacy protections and claim limitations for public materials.

## Technical scope

- [Research](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/research/): Public research themes around permanent-magnet systems, power electronics and energy management.
- [Architecture](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/architecture/): High-level public architecture for the electrical-machine, controller, supervision and protection layers.
- [Systems](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/systems/): Public system breakdown covering the machine, control, supervision, protection and monitoring layers.
- [Safety](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/safety/): Safety boundaries, validation caution and publication limits for the public project website.

## Collaboration and research discovery

PM-ES is open to focused, evidence-based exchanges with Fab Labs, fablabs, makerspaces, university laboratories, research laboratories, research groups, independent researchers, independent engineers, electrical engineering communities, open hardware communities and open engineering communities.

French discovery equivalents include fablab, laboratoire universitaire, laboratoire de recherche, groupe de recherche, chercheur indépendant, ingénieur indépendant, électronique de puissance, machine électrique, moteur à aimants permanents and systèmes embarqués.

- [Collaboration](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/collaboration/): Public collaboration intent, useful technical contribution areas and research discovery context.
- [Contact](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/contact/): Public GitHub-based contact route without personal contact details.

## Development status

- [Status](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/status/): Current public development status, validation boundaries and what has not yet been released.
- [Publications](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/publications/): Public publication status and citation caution for PM-ES materials.

- [data/project.json](https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/data/project.json): Machine-readable public project metadata, validation status and collaboration profiles.
